prediction.reasoning: Stock price prediction, especially short-term, is inherently uncertain and subject to many unpredictable factors. The point estimate is set to the current price ($178.16) as a neutral forecast, assuming no immediate directional catalyst and in the absence of deeper market analysis, historical performance data, or real-time news. The confidence intervals are estimated based on an assumed annualized daily volatility of 1.5% for CRM, scaled for a 3-day period using the square root of time (sqrt(3)). These intervals represent the range within which the price is expected to fall with the given confidence level, assuming a log-normal distribution for price movements. This is a simplified model and actual price movements can deviate significantly.
